contribution_description:
[CONTRIBUTION EVENT]
- Type: Time (Minutes)
- Amount: 35
- Description: White-label D0: flip label spec to portrait 2x4 + fails-first test guard
  
  Pull requests (GitHub evidence):
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/agroverse_shop_beta/pull/183
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/agentic_ai_context/pull/665
  
  Details:
  Gary confirmed the physical label is 2in wide x 4in tall, matching the measurement taken from the product photo (267x520px = aspect 1:1.95). The page asserted 4in x 2in landscape (1200x600) in seven separate places, rotated 90 degrees from the actual product, so every design collected under it would have been unusable.
  
  Flipped all seven sites: upload validation (1200x600 -> 600x1200), the reject message, the Dimensions field ('4x2in' -> '2x4in'), the gallery card aspect-ratio (2/1 -> 1/2), the hero subtitle, the hero badge, the drop-zone hint, and How It Works step 1. The page is now internally consistent for the first time.
  
  Audited TrueSightDAO/agroverse-designs before flipping: designs/ contained only .gitkeep, so zero artwork had been collected under the wrong spec and no data migration was needed.
  
  New test guard (tests/white-label-label-spec.spec.ts), verified fails-first: 5 of 7 failed against the pre-D0 tree, all 7 pass after. It guards the bug class that caused D0 - the same fact hard-coded in 7 places with nothing checking they agreed - plus the validator itself, exercised through a real file drop, since validateImageDimensions() only runs on interaction (OPERATING_INSTRUCTIONS section 10).
  
  Also fixed an off-by-one in the pre-existing UAT spec: it asserted CA at nth(6) and TX at nth(45), but index 0 is the empty placeholder, so those are CO and VT. That spec had never passed - further evidence the Phase 1 'UAT test spec' tick was never run. Full white-label suite now 26/26 green.
  
  Plan updated: D0 marked done, RESUME pointer moved to PR1 (B1+B2). Three CONTEXT_UPDATES entries logged for Gary rather than editing canonical files directly (PROJECT_INDEX.md still says 4x2; WORKSPACE_CONTEXT.md 'Sticker Mule 4x2in' is the likely origin of the error; AGROVERSE_WHITE_LABEL_SUPPLY_CHAIN.md is referenced but does not exist).
  
  Merged: https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/agroverse_shop_beta/pull/183 and https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/agentic_ai_context/pull/665
- Contributor(s): Claude Anthropic
- TDG Issued: 58.33
- Attached Filename: N/A
- Destination Contribution File Location: N/A
